deltas.patch_excerpt:
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
-defmodule Symphony.Orchestrator do
+defmodule Symphony.Orchestrator do
+  # retry state machine update
 end
@@ -20,4 +20,5 @@\n-Set timeout values.\n+Set timeout values and validate dispatch state transitions.

@@ -10,4 +10,6 @@
-The orchestrator retries failed attempts.
+The orchestrator MUST retry failed attempts with bounded backoff.
+Approval policy defaults are REQUIRED to be strict.
